name: io.github.up2itnow0822/agentpay
description: Non-custodial x402 payment MCP server for AI agents. Wallets and payments on 17 chains.

environmentVariables.description: Private key for the agent wallet (hex string)
environmentVariables.name: AGENT_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Base RPC URL for on-chain operations
environmentVariables.name: BASE_RPC_URL
